fields.acceptance_criteria: Multi-select via checkboxes in TicketTree; batch action bar with bulk state transition, field update, close/cancel; queue model with sequential apply and progress indicator; filter-result bulk updates; transactional batch via ticket-api batch command; optimistic UI with per-ticket status feedback
fields.title: Feature: Batch operations — multi-select, queue, bulk apply, filter-based updates
